name: White Chocolate Fig Kisses
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup finely chopped pistachio or macadamia nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small glass or metal bowl placed over a saucepan of hot water (or in a double boiler), melt the white chocolate, stirring constantly.
2. Dip one side of a fig into the melted chocolate, allowing excess to drip back into the bowl, then dip into the chopped nuts.
3. Place the dipped figs on a waxed paper-lined tray and refrigerate briefly until the chocolate has set.
4. Once set, place the figs in an airtight container with a layer of waxed paper between layers. They will keep, refrigerated, for one week.
Makes 24 fig kisses
